## Project Code Patterns
- authfail-three-branch-guard — AuthFail Three-Branch Handler Guard
- deperr-translate-pipeline — Three-Tier Error Translation Pipeline
- tx-emit-then-fanout — Transactional Emit-Then-FanOut
- dual-dialect-mirror-queries — Mirrored Dual-Dialect Query Files
- per-package-clock-interface — Per-Package Clock Interface
- testcontainers-fixture-shape — Testcontainers Fixture Package Shape
- wrapper-object-rune-store — Wrapper-Object Rune Store
- snippet-children-component — Snippet-Children Polymorphic Component
- spec-driven-event-types — Spec-Driven Event Types
- view-state-union-machine — String-Literal-Union View-State Machine
- openapi-fetch-middleware-client — openapi-fetch Client with Global Middleware
- openapi-fetch-result-branch — openapi-fetch Destructure-and-Branch Result
- same-origin-returnto-guard — Same-Origin return_to Validation
- spa-test-module-mock-barrel — SPA Test Module-Mock Barrel
- window-location-defineproperty-stub — window.location Override via Object.defineProperty
- per-instance-factory-rune-store — Per-Instance Factory Rune Store
- adapter-wrap-helpers — Adapter wrap1/wrapList Helpers
- strict-server-partial-handler-shim — Strict-Server Partial Handler Shim
- playground-activity-reset — Playground Activity Reset on Substantive Action
- ticker-sweep-loop — Context-Cancellable Ticker Sweep Loop
- package-private-composed-store-interface — Package-Private Composed Store Interface
- test-narrow-store-delegation — Test Narrow-Store Delegation Wrapper
- testenv-harness-struct — testEnv Harness Struct
- reserved-org-id-local-const-mirror — Reserved-Org-ID Local-Const Mirror
- opaque-token-hash-at-rest — Opaque credentials return raw random tokens to callers but store and look up only SHA-256 hex hashes in `token_hash` fields.
- fragment-secret-handoff — Secret browser handoff links carry raw tokens only in URL fragments and SPA screens scrub the fragment immediately after reading it.
- session-scoped-portal-client — Session-bound CLI portal calls construct `portalclient.Client{BaseURL, SessionID}` and wire refresh only for durable credentials.
- nullable-timestamp-transition-guard — Terminal transitions set nullable `*_at` fields through `UPDATE ... WHERE *_at IS NULL`, using affected rows or `RETURNING` when caller must know who won.

Load the `patterns` skill (read `.agents/skills/patterns/<slug>.md`) for full rationale, examples, and common violations.
